labels.name: needs-triage
labels.description: Needs initial maintainer classification

labels.name: type:challenge
labels.description: Theory rebuttal or rule challenge

labels.name: type:route
labels.description: Routing or output-contract failure

labels.name: type:field-report
labels.description: Professional field evidence from practice

labels.name: type:learning
labels.description: Learning or onboarding friction

labels.name: type:community
labels.description: Community process or governance change

labels.name: status:needs-evidence
labels.description: Valid direction but more evidence required

labels.name: status:reproducing
labels.description: Maintainers are reproducing or pressure-testing the report

labels.name: status:routed
labels.description: Feedback mapped to a target asset type

labels.name: status:encoded
labels.description: Feedback has been absorbed into repository assets

labels.name: status:deferred
labels.description: Valid but postponed due to scope or timing

labels.name: kind:counterexample
labels.description: Concrete example that breaks a claim, route, or rubric

labels.name: kind:scope-correction
labels.description: Claim survives but needs narrower scope

labels.name: kind:boundary-mismatch
labels.description: Soft constraints and hard boundaries were confused

labels.name: kind:premature-convergence
labels.description: Multiple viable paths were collapsed too early

labels.name: discussion-first
labels.description: Keep this in Discussions until the change is scoped enough for an issue

labels.name: needs-counterexample
labels.description: Actionable direction, but a concrete counterexample is still missing

labels.name: needs-route-reproduction
labels.description: Need a more reproducible route-failure example before changing routing

labels.name: needs-practitioner-input
labels.description: Waiting for input from working screenwriters or adjacent professionals

labels.name: needs-second-field-report
labels.description: One field report exists, but a second case would raise confidence

labels.name: needs-maintainer-decision
labels.description: Requires repository-owner judgment on scope, policy, or trade-off
